title: SourceHealth
description: Health monitoring schema for acquisition sources, covering availability, latency, error rates, parser drift, and overall status.

source_id.description: Identifies the source contract whose health is being reported.

health_indicators.description: List of individual health indicators composing the overall report.

parser_drift_reports.description: Parser drift reports tracking schema evolution and extraction quality.

SourceHealthReport.title: SourceHealthReport
SourceHealthReport.description: Aggregated health report for a source at a point in time.

status.description: Overall health status of the source.

checked_at.description: ISO 8601 UTC timestamp of the health check.

error_rate.description: Fraction of requests resulting in errors (0..1).

uptime_percentage.description: Uptime percentage over the reporting window.

last_successful_fetch.description: Timestamp of the last successful fetch from this source.

HealthIndicator.title: HealthIndicator
HealthIndicator.description: A single measurable health indicator for a source.

value.description: Numeric or string value of the indicator.

threshold.description: Threshold used to determine the status.

ParserDriftReport.title: ParserDriftReport
ParserDriftReport.description: Report on parser drift — changes in source structure that cause extraction mismatches.

parser_id.description: Identifier of the parser being monitored.

drift_severity.description: Estimated severity of the schema drift.

expected_schema_hash.description: Hash of the previously known/expected schema.

actual_schema_hash.description: Hash of the newly observed schema.

affected_fields.description: Field paths that changed between expected and actual schemas.

automatically_adapted.description: Whether the parser was able to auto-adapt to the drift.
